scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @vedaai/api" "npm run worker -w @vedaai/api" "npm run dev -w @vedaai/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @vedaai/shared && npm run build -w @vedaai/api && npm run build -w @vedaai/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @vedaai/shared && npm run build -w @vedaai/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @vedaai/shared && npm run build -w @vedaai/web
